summary: Tested all 7 mobile pages for PillarCategoryStrip chips, PawrentFirstStepsTab, sticky tab bars, and soul profile placement. Fixed critical Shop page crash (showShopPlan state undefined). 4 pages missing FIRST_STEPS entries cause PawrentFirstStepsTab to silently return null.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED: ReferenceError: showShopPlan is not defined — crashed entire Shop page with 'Oops! Something went wrong'. Added const [showShopPlan, setShowShopPlan] = useState(false) to ShopMobilePage state declarations.

integration_issues.issue: Component is placed in JSX (EmergencyMobilePage.jsx line 259) but returns null because FIRST_STEPS['emergency'] is undefined in PawrentJourney.jsx. No steps defined for 'emergency' pillar.
Component is placed in JSX (FarewellMobilePage.jsx line 212) but returns null because FIRST_STEPS['farewell'] is undefined in PawrentJourney.jsx. No steps defined for 'farewell' pillar.
Component is placed in JSX (ShopMobilePage.jsx line 544) but returns null because FIRST_STEPS['shop'] is undefined in PawrentJourney.jsx. No steps defined for 'shop' pillar.
Component is placed in JSX (ServicesMobilePage.jsx line 280) but returns null because FIRST_STEPS['services'] is undefined in PawrentJourney.jsx. No steps defined for 'services' pillar.

passing_tests: Learn - CategoryStrip chips visible: strip-cat-foundations ✓, strip-cat-behaviour ✓, strip-cat-training ✓, strip-cat-mira ✓
Learn - Tab bar is sticky: position='sticky', top='0px', zIndex='100' ✓
Learn - PillarSoulProfile INSIDE tab content (tabBarBottom=488, soulProfileTop=526, isBelow=True) ✓
Learn - Strip chip click updates activeDim: clicking strip-cat-foundations gives borderBottomColor=rgb(124,58,237), 3px ✓
Learn - PawrentFirstStepsTab renders (Training session step visible) ✓
Paperwork - CategoryStrip chips visible: strip-cat-identity ✓, strip-cat-health ✓, strip-cat-travel ✓, strip-cat-insurance ✓
Paperwork - Tab bar is sticky: position='sticky', top='0px', zIndex='100' ✓
Paperwork - PawrentFirstStepsTab renders (Insurance review step visible) ✓
Emergency - CategoryStrip chips visible: strip-cat-kit ✓, strip-cat-vets ✓, strip-cat-poison ✓
Farewell - CategoryStrip chips visible: strip-cat-eol ✓, strip-cat-memorial ✓, strip-cat-grief ✓
Adopt - CategoryStrip chips visible: strip-cat-thinking ✓, strip-cat-ready ✓, strip-cat-looking ✓
Adopt - CategoryStrip is ABOVE tab bar (stripTop=362 < tabBarTop=440) ✓
Adopt - PawrentFirstStepsTab renders (Home comfort check step visible) ✓
Services - CategoryStrip chips visible: strip-cat-pamper ✓, strip-cat-health ✓, strip-cat-learn ✓
Shop - Page renders without crash (after fix) ✓
failing_tests: Emergency - PawrentFirstStepsTab: NOT rendered (FIRST_STEPS.emergency missing → steps.length===0 → returns null)
Farewell - PawrentFirstStepsTab: NOT rendered (FIRST_STEPS.farewell missing → steps.length===0 → returns null)
Shop - PawrentFirstStepsTab: NOT rendered (FIRST_STEPS.shop missing → steps.length===0 → returns null)
Services - PawrentFirstStepsTab: NOT rendered (FIRST_STEPS.services missing → steps.length===0 → returns null)
action_items: Add FIRST_STEPS entries for 'emergency', 'farewell', 'shop', 'services' pillars in /app/frontend/src/components/pawrent/PawrentJourney.jsx (around line 186, after adopt block). Currently PawrentFirstStepsTab silently returns null for these 4 pillars because steps array is empty.
Suggested emergency steps: first-aid-kit (Book via Concierge®), emergency-vet (Find 24hr Vet), poison-response (Accident & Poison Plan)
Suggested farewell steps: eol-plan (End-of-Life Care Planning via Concierge®), memorial (Memorial Product), grief-support (Grief Counselling Referral)
Suggested shop steps: mira-picks (See Mira's Shop Picks), breed-collection (Browse Breed Collection)
Suggested services steps: book-grooming (Book Grooming via Concierge®), vet-consult (Book Vet Consult)
critical_code_review_comments: ShopMobilePage.jsx: showShopPlan state was missing from useState declarations — caused ReferenceError crash. FIXED: added const [showShopPlan, setShowShopPlan] = useState(false) at line 433.

PawrentJourney.jsx FIRST_STEPS: Only defines steps for care/dine/learn/paperwork/go/celebrate/play/adopt. Missing entries for emergency/farewell/shop/services means PawrentFirstStepsTab silently renders null on those 4 pages despite being placed in JSX.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shop page crash (showShopPlan undefined) FIXED. All 7 CategoryStrip implementations verified working. Sticky tab bars on Learn and Paperwork confirmed. Soul Profile inside tab content confirmed. The only remaining issue is FIRST_STEPS missing for 4 pillars (emergency, farewell, shop, services) in PawrentJourney.jsx — all 4 need steps entries so PawrentFirstStepsTab renders visible content rather than returning null.
rca_of_issue: PawrentFirstStepsTab returns null when steps.length===0 (line 254 in PawrentJourney.jsx: if (mode === 'CONSIDERING' || steps.length === 0) return null). FIRST_STEPS object only has entries for: care, dine, learn, paperwork, go, celebrate, play, adopt. Emergency/farewell/shop/services are not present. Fix: add appropriate step arrays for these 4 pillars in FIRST_STEPS.
